name: change-control-compiler
description: Compile vague software requests into enforceable Change Control Contracts before implementation.

interface.shortDescription: Turn vague change requests into enforceable scope, verification, and drift-control contracts.
interface.longDescription: Change Control Compiler helps coding agents stay within scope by compiling user requests into machine-checkable contracts before implementation. Contracts define goals, non-goals, allowed and forbidden areas, required tests, verification commands, risk, stop conditions, rollback plans, and final acceptance criteria.
defaultPrompt: Compile this request into a Change Control Contract.
Check drift before the final response.
